dct_title_s: Typus orarum maritimarum Guinae, Manicongo Angloae ultra promontorium Bonae Spei
dct_description_sm: Jan Huygen van Linschoten ... Arnold Florent van Langren,.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Shows the west and southwest coast of Africa.
Includes 2 compass roses, title cartouche, scale cartouche, Portuguese coat of arms, inset illustrations of Ascension and St. Helena, and pictorial representations of ships and sea monsters.
Decorative title cartouche features birds, fruits, and the Portuguese coat of arms.
Decorative scale cartouche features birds and a compass.
Bar scales on map: "Miliaria Germanica, quorum 15. uni gradui respondent" and "Hispanicę leucę 17 1/2. uni gradui competencia".

On the continent, there are pictorial representations of several animals: two snakes, a lion, an elephant, and a rhinoceros; in Lake Zaire, there are two merpeople, one playing a stringed instrument and the other blowing a conch shell.
